planner.summary: Expanded the repo control plane to goal queues, proposal confirmation, sprint and cruise modes, and reporter plus reviewer flows.

worker.summary: Implemented install, intake-goal, approve-proposal, set-run-mode, pause/resume, report, review, merge, schemas, automation prompts, and the corrected autonomy-branch merge gate.
worker.verify_summary: npm run build; node ./node_modules/vitest/vitest.mjs run; pwsh -File scripts/verify.ps1

review.summary: All CLI tests passed, the merge gate now reads review state from codex/autonomy itself, and the root control plane passed verify plus review.

commit.summary: No repository commit was recorded during implementation; the repo remains intentionally uncommitted.
